where.if: AND (1=0 OR v.vendor_nm ILIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%' OR v.ceo_nm ILIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%' )

if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != '' and dateType != null and dateType != ''

choose.when: AND v.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND v.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')
AND v.upd_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND v.upd_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.sy :: SyVendor :: selectById */ v.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_vc.code_label AS vendor_class_cd_nm , cd_vs.code_label AS vendor_status_cd_nm FROM sy_vendor v LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = v.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_vc ON cd_vc.code_grp = 'VENDOR_CLASS' AND cd_vc.code_value = v.vendor_class_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_vs ON cd_vs.code_grp = 'VENDOR_STATUS' AND cd_vs.code_value = v.vendor_status_cd WHERE v.vendor_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.sy :: SyVendor :: selectList */ v.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_vc.code_label AS vendor_class_cd_nm , cd_vs.code_label AS vendor_status_cd_nm FROM sy_vendor v LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = v.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_vc ON cd_vc.code_grp = 'VENDOR_CLASS' AND cd_vc.code_value = v.vendor_class_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_vs ON cd_vs.code_grp = 'VENDOR_STATUS' AND cd_vs.code_value = v.vendor_status_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.sy :: SyVendor :: selectPageList */ v.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_vc.code_label AS vendor_class_cd_nm , cd_vs.code_label AS vendor_status_cd_nm FROM sy_vendor v LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = v.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_vc ON cd_vc.code_grp = 'VENDOR_CLASS' AND cd_vc.code_value = v.vendor_class_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_vs ON cd_vs.code_grp = 'VENDOR_STATUS' AND cd_vs.code_value = v.vendor_status_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(v.*) /* base.sy :: SyVendor :: selectPageCount */ FROM sy_vendor v
